overall.description: A cinematic drone shot slowly circles a futuristic neon-lit pyramid structure in a flooded urban plaza at dusk. The scene is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring cyberpunk architecture with glowing green geometric patterns on the pyramid and a tall obelisk monument. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with water reflections and no visible pedestrians or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded plaza with neon pyramid monument

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the pyramid structure to survey the flooded plaza area

entered.detail: large pyramid with glowing green geometric neon lines and a beam of light emanating from the apex
shallow water covering the ground reflecting the pyramid lights and sky
distant modern buildings with illuminated windows against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide flooded plaza at dusk, dominated by a futuristic pyramid structure with glowing green neon geometric patterns. The camera drifts slowly to the right, revealing water reflections and distant cyberpunk city buildings under a purple-orange sky. No pedestrians or vehicles are present in the empty plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded plaza between pyramid and obelisk monuments

events.description: tall stone obelisk monument with glowing base enters the frame from the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to circle the plaza, shifting focus from the pyramid to the newly visible obelisk

entered.detail: tall dark obelisk with a glowing circular base pattern rising from the flooded plaza

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow drift, the pyramid moves to the left side of the frame and a tall obelisk monument comes into view on the right. The flooded plaza stretches between these two landmarks, with the obelisk's glowing base becoming more prominent as the camera approaches. The scene remains empty of any pedestrian or vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded plaza approaching obelisk under concrete overhang

events.description: camera moves under a dark concrete overhang structure, significantly reducing ambient light and sky visibility

agents.ego_description: approaching the obelisk monument while passing underneath a concrete overhang structure

entered.detail: dark concrete structure overhead that the camera passes beneath, creating a frame around the view

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the obelisk, which now dominates the center of the frame with its glowing circular base pattern clearly visible. Around the 55-second mark, the camera passes under a dark concrete overhang that partially obscures the sky and dims the scene. The pyramid remains visible in the distant left background while the camera continues its slow forward drift toward the obelisk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera drift across a flooded urban plaza that shifts from a wide view of a neon pyramid to a close-up focus on a glowing obelisk. It begins by gliding past a futuristic pyramid adorned with green geometric patterns, capturing the reflections of a purple-orange dusk sky in the still water of the empty plaza. As the camera continues its slow rightward movement, the pyramid recedes to the left to make room for a tall obelisk monument that emerges on the right. The scene then narrows its focus as the camera approaches the obelisk, bringing its glowing circular base into sharp relief. Finally, the view passes under a dark concrete overhang that dims the lighting and partially obscures the sky before the camera continues its forward drift toward the monument.
